evals.name: ceo-cross-repo-feature
evals.prompt: Non-technical CEO requests a community-manager feature that ripples into supplier and notifications. Tests cross-repo evaluation, batched-by-department questioning, and clear surfacing of unknowns.
evals.expected_output: A complete ticket markdown that identifies community-proj as primary, Admin_system + notifications as touched, with open questions for the team and clean acceptance criteria.

evals.name: vague-bug-mandatory-fields
evals.prompt: Vague bug report ('notifications sometimes don't arrive'). Tests bug-mandatory-fields enforcement and that the skill drives toward repro/severity/env even when requester is hand-wavy.
evals.expected_output: A bug ticket that either (a) extracts repro/env/severity through interview or (b) clearly flags them as ⚠ Open questions blocking execution.

evals.name: update-flow-with-new-questions
evals.prompt: Requester returns with team feedback on an existing ticket. The new info raises new questions. Tests that the update flow re-checks for gaps and asks new questions instead of silently absorbing the update.
evals.expected_output: An updated ticket draft with a Update YYYY-MM-DD changelog section, plus new open questions raised by the team feedback.
